setupSubtitle: Let's set up your profile to personalize your daily water goal.
dailyGoalDisclaimerContent: We've set your daily goal to a maximum of {suggestedAmount} to keep things within our recommended range. For personalized advice, feel free to consult a healthcare professional.
setupError: Oops. An error occurred while saving your informations.
ageInputRequirement: You must be between {minAge} and {maxAge} years old
dataPrivacy: Your data never leaves your device.
inputRequirement: Please, enter a value between {minValue} and {maxValue}
emptyHistorySubtitle: It looks like you haven't tracked any water today. Ready to start?
